hyperedges.description: GPT-5.5, Opus 4.7, and Gemini 3.1 Pro compared across terminal ops, knowledge work, browser ops, OS ops, SWE-bench, financial analysis, MCP integration, math reasoning, and API pricing benchmarks
hyperedges.source_file: 20260424-GPT55-超速報-Codex時代-Opus47比較-ベンチマーク-中島.html

hyperedges.description: Harness engineering encompasses context engineering, feedforward/feedback patterns, and planner-generator-evaluator patterns. Practiced by LangChain (improved from top 30+ to top 5), Vercel (reduced tools from 17-18 to achieve 100% success rate), and applied to Claude Code and Codex
hyperedges.source_file: 20260411-ハーネスエンジニアリング超入門-有名企業の成果-引き算の哲学-はじめてAIコードラボ.html

hyperedges.description: GPT Image 2.0 outperforms NanoBanana in arena benchmarks, character consistency, and Japanese text rendering. Recommended workflow: use NanoBanana for world-building, then GPT Image 2.0 for enhancement. Both models available via respective platforms (OpenAI and Google AI Studio)
hyperedges.source_file: 20260422-GPTImage2-異次元超え-ナノバナナ比較-漫画-ビジネス実用-ワンダー佐藤.html
